Notes: Single UPDATE deletes the TXT RRset at hold.campus.edu. and then adds a new TXT RR at the same owner/type. The follow-up QUERY observes whether the server applied the operations sequentially, rejected the conflict, or otherwise normalized the message.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing TXT RRset at hold.campus.edu. and then add a new TXT RR at the same owner/type in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: hold.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the post-state of the TXT RRset after the conflicting UPDATE.
